events.title: openai/codex 0.129.0
events.summaryText: ## New Features - The TUI now supports modal Vim editing in the composer, including `/vim`, default-mode config, and Vim-specific keymap contexts. (#18595) - TUI workflows are easier to resume and copy from with a redesigned resume/fork picker, raw scrollback mode, `/ide` context injection, and workspace-aware `/diff`. (#20065, #20819, #20294, #21001) - The status line can show theme-aware colors plus optional PR and branch-change summaries, and `/keymap debug` helps inspect terminal key even...

events.title: @openai/codex 0.129.0
events.summaryText:
npm i -g @openai/codex
or brew install --cask codex

Codex CLI is a coding agent from OpenAI that runs locally on your computer.
